quotes.terms:
This quotation is valid for 7 days from the date of issue.
Photography & videography bookings require 50% advance to confirm; the balance is payable before the session.
Studio rentals require 100% advance payment to confirm the booking.
All payments are non-refundable.
One complimentary reschedule is permitted if requested at least 48 hours prior to the booked slot.
No refund or reschedule is available within 48 hours of the booked slot.
Prices are inclusive of GST at prevailing rates.
